executives.name: George Conrades
executives.background: Chairman Emeritus of Akamai Technologies, Inc.

executives.name: James Farley, Jr.
executives.background: Jim Farley is Ford President and Chief Executive Officer, and a member of the Board of Directors. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer and has held various leadership roles since joining Ford in 2007.

executives.name: Martha Brooks
executives.background: Former President and COO of Novelis Inc. Director of Constellium SE.

executives.name: Matthew Levatich
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Harley-Davidson, Inc.

executives.name: Troy Alstead
executives.background: Troy Alstead has served as a member of our Board since March 2021. Mr. Alstead previously served as Chief Operating Officer of Starbucks Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Director (and Chairman of the Board effective October 1, 2025)
